title: Beginner
message: Start solving problems to improve your skills and climb the ranks!

title: Novice
message: This is just the beginning for something great!

title: Intermediate
message: You're doing a fantastic job! Keep solving problems to become an expert!

title: Skilled
message: Impressive work! You're well on your way to becoming a pro!

title: Proficient
message: You're a pro! Keep up the amazing work!

title: Expert
message: Amazing job! You're an expert now. Keep solving problems to inspire others!

title: Master
message: You're a master! Keep solving to maintain your skills!

title: Grandmaster
message: You're a grandmaster! Your skills are legendary!

title: Legend
message: You're a legend! Your achievements are unmatched!

title: Mythic
message: You've reached mythic status! You're a true coding legend!

title: Immortal
message: You're an immortal in the coding world!

title: Titan
message: You're a titan of coding! Your influence is unmatched!

title: Cosmic
message: You've reached cosmic levels of coding mastery!
